summary: Iteration 20: Testing new features - (1) File attachments in messaging for both partner and admin, (2) Extended mandatory fields validation in UniversityFormModal. All 19 test scenarios passed (100% success rate). Uploads tested via mocked /api/upload endpoint.

issues: Modal shows pre-existing test data (message '22' and 'klkl') from previous test sessions. Not a bug, just test data artifact.

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: In UniversityFormModal validation order (lines 115-160), description is validated BEFORE foundedYear and president, but the test list doesn't explicitly test the description validation. This is consistent with the code - just noting the order for future test coverage.

MINOR: Admin PartnersSection.jsx - The 'Message' button text match `button:has-text('Message')` finds 2 results (sidebar 'Messages' link and actual button). The correct selector to use is `data-testid^='msg-partner-offer-'`. Tests should use this specific testid.

INFO: Upload mocking approach: /api/upload/signature returns 400 to trigger fallback to /api/upload (which returns fake URL). This successfully simulates file upload for testing image field validations in UniversityFormModal without actual Cloudinary access.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test form data was only filled in UI, not persisted (upload was mocked with fake URL).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20: All 19 tests passed. Partner: partner@test.com/Partner2025!. Admin: admin@winners-consulting.com/Admin2025!. Tested features: (1) Partner /partner → Messages tab → paperclip (data-testid=partner-attach-file) visible, send button enabled with attachment and no text, attachment preview shown. (2) Admin /admin → Gestion → Partenaires → Offres (1) tab [data-testid=partner-admin-tab-offers] → Message button [data-testid^=msg-partner-offer-] → modal with admin-attach-file, admin-message-input, admin-message-send. (3) UniversityFormModal (isPartner=true): header 'Requis * : tous les champs marqués, min. 3 facultés, 6 conditions d admission, 5 photos et 1 vidéo YouTube'. Counters 0/3, 0/6, 0/5 all amber. Sequential validations tested: coverImage, logo, image, foundedYear, president, faculties<3, conditions<6 - all show correct error messages. Upload mocking: /api/upload/signature → 400, /api/upload → {url: fake URL}. Admin Message button is at data-testid='msg-partner-offer-{offer_id}' (not generic 'Message' button which conflicts with sidebar).

UniversityFormModal: submit with 3 conditions (< 6) → error 'Minimum 6 conditions d'admission requises. Vous en avez 3.'
